cover.subtitle:
학생과 시민이 세운
9개월의 짧은 봄.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a crowd of young Korean university students in 1960s school uniforms — boys in dark jackets, girls in white blouses — marching forward together with raised fists, viewed at a slight upward angle. One student in front holds a long blank cloth banner above his head (no readable text). Background: a wide stone plaza in front of a classical National Assembly building silhouette. Color: warm gray crowd + red banner accent + blue sky. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 4·19 혁명의 도화선(김주열), 내각책임제 + 양원제 개헌, 장면 내각의 경제개발 5개년 계획 수립, 5·16 정변 시점이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small raised-fist silhouette with a blank cloth banner. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
